message.content:
I need to understand the camera system and level transition flow in this UE5 project. Read these files thoroughly:

1. Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.h - look for camera-related code (smooth movement, camera panning, zoom, any camera interpolation/lerp)
2. Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp - specifically the Tick function and any camera update logic, also BeginPlay for camera initialization
3. Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.h - camera-related code
4. Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp - camera update logic, Tick, BeginPlay
5. Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h - TransitionToBattle and TransitionToWorldMap declarations
6. Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.cpp - TransitionToBattle and TransitionToWorldMap implementations

I need to understand:
- How camera smooth movement works in both controllers (is it lerp-based in Tick?)
- How level transitions happen (OpenLevel?)
- Where camera position is set on BeginPlay
- Any existing transition/fade logic

content.text: I'll read these files to understand the camera system and level transition flow.

1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Engine/GameInstance.h"
     5→#include "LFPGameInstance.generated.h"
     6→
     7→class ALFPWorldMapNode;
     8→class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
     9→
    10→// 轻量单位数据：跨关卡保存用
    11→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    12→struct FLFPUnitEntry
    13→{
    14→	GENERATED_BODY()
    15→
    16→	// 单位类型 ID（对应 ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset 中的键）
    17→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    18→	FName TypeID = NAME_None;
    19→
    20→	// 单位阶级
    21→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    22→	int32 Tier = 1;
    23→
    24→	bool IsValid() const { return TypeID != NAME_None; }
    25→};
    26→
    27→// 战斗请求：世界地图 → 战斗场景传递的数据
    28→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    29→struct FLFPBattleRequest
    30→{
    31→	GENERATED_BODY()
    32→
    33→	// 触发战斗的节点 ID
    34→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    35→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    36→
    37→	// 战斗地图 CSV 文件名（对应 Saved/Maps/ 下的 CSV）
    38→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    39→	FString BattleMapName;
    40→
    41→	// 敌人星级
    42→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    43→	int32 StarRating = 1;
    44→
    45→	// 是否可逃跑
    46→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    47→	bool bCanEscape = true;
    48→
    49→	// 节点基础金币奖励
    50→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    51→	int32 BaseGoldReward = 0;
    52→
    53→	// 节点基础食物奖励
    54→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    55→	int32 BaseFoodReward = 0;
    56→
    57→	// 是否有有效请求
    58→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    59→	bool bIsValid = false;
    60→};
    61→
    62→// 战斗结果：战斗场景 → 世界地图传递的数据
    63→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    64→struct FLFPBattleResult
    65→{
    66→	GENERATED_BODY()
    67→
    68→	// 对应的节点 ID
    69→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")

    71→

    79→

    83→

    87→
    88→	// 总食物奖励（基础 + 击杀掉落）

    92→	// 是否有有效结果

    96→
    97→// 世界地图状态快照：跨关卡保持
    98→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    99→struct FLFPWorldMapSnapshot
   100→{
   101→	GENERATED_BODY()
   102→
   103→	// 当前世界地图名

   106→
   107→	// 玩家当前节点 ID

   118→
   119→	// 已揭露节点

   130→};
   131→
   132→/**
   133→ * 游戏实例：跨关卡生命周期
   134→ * 负责世界地图 ↔ 战斗场景之间的状态传递
   135→ */
   136→UCLASS()
   137→class LFP2D_API ULFPGameInstance : public UGameInstance
   138→{
   139→	GENERATED_BODY()
   140→
   141→public:
   142→	// ============== 战斗请求/结果 ==============
   143→
   144→	// 设置战斗请求（世界地图调用，进入战斗前）
   145→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   146→	void SetBattleRequest(const FLFPBattleRequest& Request);
   147→
   148→	// 获取战斗请求（战斗场景调用，读取后清除）
   149→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   150→	FLFPBattleRequest ConsumeBattleRequest();
   151→
   152→	// 设置战斗结果（战斗场景调用，结束战斗时）
   153→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   154→	void SetBattleResult(const FLFPBattleResult& Result);
   155→
   156→	// 获取战斗结果（世界地图调用，读取后清除）
   157→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   158→	FLFPBattleResult ConsumeBattleResult();
   159→
   160→	// ============== 世界地图快照 ==============
   161→
   162→	// 保存世界地图状态快照
   163→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   164→	void SaveWorldMapSnapshot(const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& Snapshot);
   165→
   166→	// 获取世界地图快照（不清除，世界地图关卡可多次读取）
   167→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   168→	const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& GetWorldMapSnapshot() const { return WorldMapSnapshot; }
   169→
   170→	// 是否有待处理的战斗结果
   171→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   172→	bool HasPendingBattleResult() const { return PendingBattleResult.bIsValid; }
   173→
   174→	// ============== 场景切换 ==============
   175→
   176→	// 切换到战斗场景
   177→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   178→	void TransitionToBattle(const FString& BattleLevelName);
   179→
   180→	// 切换回世界地图
   181→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   182→	void TransitionToWorldMap(const FString& WorldMapLevelName);
   183→
   184→	// 世界地图关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   185→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   186→	FString DefaultWorldMapLevelName = TEXT("Test_WorldMap");
   187→
   188→	// 战斗关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   189→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   190→	FString DefaultBattleLevelName = TEXT("Test_Fight");
   191→
   192→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   193→
   194→	// ============== 资源系统 ==============
   195→
   196→	// 金币
   197→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Resources")
   198→	int32 Gold = 0;
   199→
   200→	// 食物
   201→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Resources")
   202→	int32 Food = 0;
   203→
   204→	// 增加金币
   205→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Resources")
   206→	void AddGold(int32 Amount);
   207→
   208→	// 增加食物
   209→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Resources")
   210→	void AddFood(int32 Amount);
   211→
   212→	// 获取金币
   213→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Resources")
   214→	int32 GetGold() const { return Gold; }
   215→
   216→	// 获取食物
   217→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Resources")
   218→	int32 GetFood() const { return Food; }
   219→
   220→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   221→
   222→	// 单位注册表（蓝图中配置，全局唯一）
   223→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   224→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
   225→
   226→	// 出战队伍
   227→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   228→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> PartyUnits;
   229→
   230→	// 备战营
   231→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   232→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> ReserveUnits;
   233→
   234→	// 出战队伍上限
   235→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   236→	int32 MaxPartySize = 3;
   237→
   238→	// 备战营上限
   239→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   240→	int32 MaxReserveSize = 3;
   241→
   242→	// 尝试添加单位：先队伍 → 再备战 → 都满返回 false
   243→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   244→	bool TryAddUnit(const FLFPUnitEntry& Unit);
   245→
   246→	// 队伍是否已满
   247→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   248→	bool IsPartyFull() const { return PartyUnits.Num() >= MaxPartySize; }
   249→
   250→	// 备战营是否已满
   251→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   252→	bool IsReserveFull() const { return ReserveUnits.Num() >= MaxReserveSize; }
   253→
   254→	// 替换队伍中的单位
   255→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   256→	void ReplacePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   257→
   258→	// 替换备战营中的单位
   259→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   260→	void ReplaceReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   261→
   262→	// 移除队伍单位
   263→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   264→	void RemovePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   265→
   266→	// 移除备战营单位
   267→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   268→	void RemoveReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   269→
   270→protected:
   271→	// 待处理的战斗请求
   272→	UPROPERTY()
   273→	FLFPBattleRequest PendingBattleRequest;
   274→
   275→	// 待处理的战斗结果
   276→	UPROPERTY()
   277→	FLFPBattleResult PendingBattleResult;
   278→
   279→	// 世界地图状态快照
   280→	UPROPERTY()
   281→	FLFPWorldMapSnapshot WorldMapSnapshot;
   282→};
   283→

content.text:
## Summary

I've thoroughly analyzed the camera system and level transition flow. Here's what I found:

### Camera System

**Tactics Battle Controller (LFPTacticsPlayerController):**
- **Tick-based smooth movement** (line 128-237): Uses `FMath::VInterpTo()` with speed 5.0f to smoothly interpolate camera position
- **Camera setup**: Pitch angle 60°, Yaw angle 0°, with CameraOffset (XY pan) and CurrentZoom (height)
- **Camera calculation** (lines 151-172):
  - Base location: GridManager position + CameraOffset
  - Direction offset calculated from rotation and zoom
  - Z height: `CurrentZoom * 0.5f`
  - Smooth interpolation applied every frame

**World Map Controller (LFPWorldMapPlayerController):**
- **Tick-based smooth movement** (line 41-69): Uses `FMath::RInterpTo()` for rotation and `FMath::VInterpTo()` for position, both with speed 5.0f
- **Camera setup**: Pitch angle -60° (looking down), with CameraOffset and CurrentZoom
- **Camera calculation** (lines 52-68):
  - Target location: CameraOffset + Z height (CurrentZoom)
  - Target rotation: Pitch -60°, Yaw 0°
  - Smooth interpolation applied every frame via controlled Pawn

**Camera Controls (both controllers):**
- Pan: Direct offset modification (lines 460-477 tactics, 267-271 worldmap)
- Drag: Mouse delta-based offset (lines 486-514 tactics, 280-290 worldmap)
- Zoom: Clamped between MinZoomDistance (300) and MaxZoomDistance (2000)

### Level Transitions

**GameInstance (LFPGameInstance):**
- **TransitionToBattle()** (lines 44-49): Uses `UGameplayStatics::OpenLevel()` with battle level name
- **TransitionToWorldMap()** (lines 51-56): Uses `UGameplayStatics::OpenLevel()` with world map level name
- **No fade/transition effects** currently implemented - direct level load

**World Map Flow:**
- EnterBattle() (lines 422-466 in WorldMapPlayerController):
  1. Saves world map snapshot to GameInstance
  2. Sets battle request with node data
  3. Calls `GI->TransitionToBattle(TEXT(""))`

**Key Files:**
- `/d:/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Source/LFP2D/Player/LFPTacticsPlayerController.cpp` - Battle camera (lines 128-172)
- `/d:/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Source/LFP2D/WorldMap/LFPWorldMapPlayerController.cpp` - World map camera (lines 41-69)
- `/d:/UE/UE_Project/LFP2D/Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.cpp` - Level transitions (lines 44-56)
